name: Construction Debris Removal
description: Complete post-construction debris hauling from data center build sites in the Cedar Rapids corridor. We remove concrete waste, scrap metal, packaging materials, drywall, insulation, and general construction debris from projects at Big Cedar Industrial Center and beyond.

faqs.question: What types of construction debris do you remove?
faqs.answer: We haul concrete waste, scrap metal, wood, drywall, insulation, packaging materials, cable spools, and general construction debris from data center sites.

faqs.question: Do you service the Big Cedar Industrial Center?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide debris removal services for projects at Big Cedar Industrial Center and throughout the Cedar Rapids metro area.

faqs.question: Do you handle hazardous materials?
faqs.answer: We do not handle hazardous materials. We focus on standard construction debris and non-hazardous waste removal.

seo.title: Construction Debris Removal — Cedar Rapids | Freight Bridge LLC
seo.description: Professional construction debris removal for data center projects in Cedar Rapids. Serving Big Cedar Industrial Center. Owner-operated hauling by Freight Bridge LLC.

name: Decommissioned Equipment Hauling
description: Safe removal and transport of decommissioned data center equipment — old server racks, cooling units, UPS systems, cable trays, and obsolete infrastructure. Careful handling with owner-supervised loading for Cedar Rapids area projects.

faqs.question: What kind of equipment do you haul?
faqs.answer: Server racks, cooling units, UPS systems, PDUs, cable trays, raised floor tiles, and other decommissioned data center infrastructure.

faqs.question: Do you provide data destruction services?
faqs.answer: We focus on physical removal and transport. We can deliver equipment to your certified ITAD or e-waste recycling partner.

faqs.question: Can you work with the QTS or Google project timelines?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Mohamed coordinates directly with site managers to schedule removal runs that fit your project phases.

seo.title: Decommissioned Equipment Hauling — Cedar Rapids | Freight Bridge LLC
seo.description: Safe hauling of decommissioned data center equipment in Cedar Rapids. Server racks, cooling units, UPS systems removed with owner supervision.

name: Post-Construction Site Cleanup
description: Final-phase site cleanup for data center construction projects in Cedar Rapids. We clear remaining materials, haul leftover supplies, and leave the site ready for commissioning. Coordinated with your project timeline.

faqs.question: When do you come in for site cleanup?
faqs.answer: We come in during the final construction phase — after major buildout is complete but before commissioning. We work around your active construction schedule.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond?
faqs.answer: We're based locally in the Iowa City-Cedar Rapids corridor. Mohamed can be on-site within hours for urgent cleanup needs.

seo.title: Post-Construction Site Cleanup — Cedar Rapids | Freight Bridge LLC
seo.description: Post-construction site cleanup for data center builds in Cedar Rapids. Final-phase material removal coordinated with your project timeline.
